target.title: Simplify QA scorecard mapping shape
target.body:
## Summary

- Replace category `scenarioRefs` with typed `evidenceRefs` so scorecard mappings can point to QA scenario Markdown, Vitest, Playwright, and live transport evidence sources without overloading one field.
- Keep profile membership one-way from top-level `profiles[].categoryIds`; categories no longer duplicate profile selectors.
- Remove mapping fields that were policy/narrative/provenance rather than executable mapping authority, including per-category support/release/profile metadata, freshness/live booleans, docs/code refs, and stale taxonomy snapshot metadata.
- Keep validation warnings for missing profile membership, incomplete category evidence, missing coverage IDs, missing evidence refs, and QA scenario refs that do not cover the category coverage IDs.
- Report mapped coverage percentage and mapped evidence-ref count.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-taxonomy.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs qa coverage --json > /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-typed-refs.json && jq '.scorecardTaxonomy | {mappedCoverageIdCount, mappedCoverageIdPercent, mappedEvidenceRefCount, unmappedCoverageIdCount, categoryCount, profileCount, validationIssueCount: (.validationIssues | length)}' /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-typed-refs.json`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Current real mapping report: 15 categories, 2 profiles, 42 mapped coverage IDs, 103 unmapped coverage IDs, 36 mapped evidence refs, 29.0% mapped coverage, 0 validation warnings.
